applied_fixes.issue: Missing viewport meta tag causing poor mobile rendering and CLS issues.
applied_fixes.action: Add <meta name='viewport' content='width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0'> to the head section.

applied_fixes.issue: Missing canonical link tags resulting in duplicate content indexing risks.
applied_fixes.action: Implement dynamic canonical URL generation based on current route path in the head tag.

applied_fixes.issue: Absence of structured data (JSON-LD) for organization schema hindering rich result potential.
applied_fixes.action: Inject Organization Schema JSON-LD script tag into the head component.
